lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What does she mean by 'change' in the last sentence?
lines.chinese: 在最后一句话中，她说的“零钱”是什么意思？
lines.raw: What does she mean by 'change' in the last sentence? | 在最后一句话中，她说的“零钱”是什么意思？

lines.english: When my husband was going into the dining room this morning,
lines.chinese: 今天早上我丈夫走进饭厅时，
lines.raw: When my husband was going into the dining room this morning, | 今天早上我丈夫走进饭厅时，

lines.english: he dropped some coins on the floor.
lines.chinese: 他把一些硬币掉在地板上了。
lines.raw: he dropped some coins on the floor. | 他把一些硬币掉在地板上了。
There were coins everywhere. | 到处都是硬币。

lines.english: We looked for them, but we could not find them all.
lines.chinese: 我们找了找，但没有把它们全都找到。
lines.raw: We looked for them, but we could not find them all. | 我们找了找，但没有把它们全都找到。
While we were having breakfast, | 我们吃早饭的时候，

lines.english: our little boy, Tommy, found two small coins on the floor.
lines.chinese: 我们的小儿子汤米在地板上找到了两枚小硬币。
lines.raw: our little boy, Tommy, found two small coins on the floor. | 我们的小儿子汤米在地板上找到了两枚小硬币。

lines.english: He put them both into his mouth.
lines.chinese: 他把两枚硬币都放进了嘴里。
lines.raw: He put them both into his mouth. | 他把两枚硬币都放进了嘴里。

lines.english: We both tried to get the coins, but it was too late.
lines.chinese: 我们俩都想把硬币拿出来，但是太晚了。
lines.raw: We both tried to get the coins, but it was too late. | 我们俩都想把硬币拿出来，但是太晚了。

lines.chinese: 汤米已经把它们吞下去了！
lines.raw: Tommy had already swallowed them! | 汤米已经把它们吞下去了！

lines.english: Late that morning, when I was doing the housework,
lines.chinese: 早上晚些时候，我正在做家务时，
lines.raw: Late that morning, when I was doing the housework, | 早上晚些时候，我正在做家务时，

lines.english: My husband phoned me from the office.
lines.chinese: 我丈夫从办公室给我打了个电话。
lines.raw: My husband phoned me from the office. | 我丈夫从办公室给我打了个电话。
'How's Tommy?' he asked. | “汤米怎么样了？”他问。
'I don't know,' I answered, | “我不知道，”我回答说，

lines.english: 'Tommy's been to the toilet three times this morning, but I haven't had any change yet!'
lines.chinese: “今天上午汤米已经上过三次厕所了，但我还没见到有任何‘零钱’呢！”
lines.raw: 'Tommy's been to the toilet three times this morning, but I haven't had any change yet!' | “今天上午汤米已经上过三次厕所了，但我还没见到有任何‘零钱’呢！”
